message.body: Echo_Mask is now live! Streaming I Wanna Be the Guy: Christmas 2 (Secret Santa Games 2025) - Day 5
what a banger of a song otiwolRave otiwolRave otiwolRave
OtiWolf watched 20 consecutive streams and sparked a watch streak! happy halloween

ah so its not that complicated
yeah, i asked about that on iwc earlier, i got a answer though i need to figure out how to piece it together
by custom warp do you mean i can just duplicate the objWarp and input everything thats needed
Enjoying the stream? Join the discord to have a chat on days I am not streaming:   https://discord.gg/UsXjRQU
think i do know how to do it now, lemme see
all i really need the fadewarps for is for my new game to look smooth when going to a new stage
my first expedition was also a winner
my first run was in group of 4
redeemed: take off your sock and put it on your head
they should play my games echoma1Crusher
I don't remember how close it is to the end
ah this is for an untitled needle game lover? makes senser
ive been trying to play RNG temple
i got to the miku in a bit under 2 hours
ive been at it for over 4
but yeah miku is destroying me, i am not having fun
miku is extremely luck based though
i solved the lads through patience
it keeps just killing me and there is nothing i can do about it
the worst offender is the white cherry that does random 360 on itself and screenwraps
sometimes she spawns 2 of those at once
all the attacks themselves are easy anyway
its just a check if you can survive all the transitions the game throws at you
i got to the last 3 seconds twice in the first hour
have not gotten that far since
i just wanna play the final boss T.T
i had fun for the first ~2 hours too i think
but i just wanna be done with it now
Riechert watched 20 consecutive streams and sparked a watch streak! naloasBanana
it wants you to jump off low on it without pushing it off
like you drop down left of it, and then touch it low, jump off while touching the wall, then go left and doublejump in the gap
I had a feeling this button is a trap
i think youre doing that a bit more precise than intended
i think it wants you to drop down a bit diagonally right and jump back up repeatedly
and for that part i think it wants you to use two jumps per block contact more frequently
you can play it way slower
like jump off while touching the block and doublejump to have way more time
it looks hard if you have to get lots of height out of it but if you dont need height you can chill with it
youre already doing it on the very first block all the time, right
I'd call escape into ym mind a beginner challenge as well, platforming and bosses are not that hard
final stage is harder than usual yeah
I survive the pre nerf explosion in Into my mind shirt
I'm not allowed into big explosion club
I've just noticed you can do a diagonal here
Enjoying the stream? Check out my youtube channel for more / edited content:   https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCMWAZIM1egHPIou-FuCYPBg
what are those buttons showing up on the top left
im trying to find an easy strat for the circle
i think i got a nice start
i can tell you my strat so far for the circle if you want
uh sure ill try to make one
its not hard, just gotta get a feel
you can practice on the first block
i thought it was the bit game
btw why are you playing on hard mode
i just started on easier, there is a save right after
its honestly insane there are still new gimmicks being made based on whats already present from base engines
this is just push blocks + jump refreshers
personally i think these stand out more especially if you use the base tilesets and make them look good
its cool, only awkward if new concepts are desiged to the extreme right away
@TheRandomErik for a moment I got reminded about the gimmick l needle game even thiugh this isn't what you meant
Enjoying the stream? Join the discord to have a chat on days I am not streaming:   https://discord.gg/UsXjRQU

I do remember first triying the first and last phase in the final boss
Do you take adhd meds or anything for this insane level of focus?

i was gone for a second, GG!
ah i see who got rolled

then use the link in the rebind message
you need to type it lol
i know it works, i checked
oh it's running way better for you than it did for me

by shooting it from the right
shoot the apple for jump refresh

time to never rolling my game again
hell needle if it was good

first save was probably a tutorial
song from your playlist? game made by your alt?
for santa 2026 I might be more specific rather than just: yeah make needle, free hand
song reminds me of kermit smh
you skipped a floor gap at the start
would be funny if one of the triggers were in the middle of an open area
the wall tile was the trigger tile
the brown one from castlevania in iwbtg
also there is no pink in the rainbow..
pink is not a real color
pink is the absence of green
its a color our brain made up
like, all colors are made up, but rainbow colors all correspond to a single wavelength
yellow on computer monitors isnt real
and white light is all wavelengths at once
